message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All 5 blockers fixed — re-review Step 6">
Luca has fixed all 5 blocking items for Step 6 (commit 24428d1, CI green). Reviewers with blocking items — please re-review:

- Marty: project name now shows on Next Actions page
- Carson: completing action on project detail now reloads page correctly
- Heydon: (a) project-detail-focus.js added, (b) stalled flag contrast fixed to color-fg
- Scott: inline SQL moved to project_repository

If satisfied, send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me verify both blocking fixes have been applied.

content.text:
Both blocking items are resolved. Let me verify my assessment:

**B1 (Focus management on project detail page) -- RESOLVED:**
- `project-detail-focus.js` is loaded in `project_detail.html` (line 10)
- Completing an action now uses `hx-swap="none"` with `window.location.reload()` (line 8-9), so focus management is handled naturally by the browser reload -- the item is not removed from the DOM via HTMX swap, which was the original concern
- The script handles empty state and stalled notice hiding after adding actions (lines 30-38)
- The stalled notice and empty state now use always-in-DOM pattern with `hidden` attribute (lines 18, 61) -- this also addresses my M2 minor item

**B2 (Stalled flag contrast) -- RESOLVED:**
- `color: var(--color-fg)` on line 1811 of `main.css` -- dark text on light warning background will easily meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio

I also notice that my M2 minor item (empty state conditional rendering) was fixed as well -- both the stalled notice (line 18) and empty state (line 61) now use the always-in-DOM `hidden` attribute pattern.

input.content:
Re-reviewed at commit 24428d1. Both blocking items are resolved:

**B1 (Focus management on project detail page) -- RESOLVED.** Good approach: completing an action now uses `hx-swap="none"` + `window.location.reload()`, so focus is handled by the browser's natural page load behavior. The `project-detail-focus.js` correctly manages empty state and stalled notice visibility after adding actions. This sidesteps the focus-loss problem entirely.

**B2 (Stalled flag contrast) -- RESOLVED.** `color: var(--color-fg)` against `background-color: var(--color-warning-light)` provides well over the 4.5:1 WCAG AA requirement.

**Bonus:** Both my minor items were also addressed:
- M2 (empty state pattern): Both the stalled notice and the "No active next actions" message now use the always-in-DOM `hidden` attribute pattern, consistent with the inbox page.
- Accessible names on all interactive elements remain correct.

**CONSENSUS APPROVED** from Heydon Pickering (Accessibility).
input.summary: CONSENSUS APPROVED -- both blocking items resolved
